criteria.copy_state: Response must state the observed integer as the new state without merely echoing the prompt.
criteria.delete_head: Response must emit only the operations after the completed first operation, in the original order.
criteria.joint_natural: Response must carry the observed integer as state and delete exactly the completed first operation.
criteria.joint_packet: Response must be a canonical State/Plan packet with the observed integer and exactly the residual plan.

interpretation: Raw Shohin has a strong arithmetic-execution continuation bias but no demonstrated queue-consumption and state-transport updater. This diagnoses a controller target; it is not a reasoning, novelty, or training-success claim.

row_assessments.failure: executes operand expression instead of deleting plan head
executes operand expression and repeats full plan
executes remaining arithmetic from an invented state instead of emitting residual plan
uses observed state but skips/reorders operations
ignores observed state and executes operands
continues two residual operations correctly, then replays consumed operation
repeats original plan and prompt fields
repeats original plan and prompt fields
executes consumed operation and emits arithmetic lines instead of packet
